title: Jamaican Pears Gaelette
description: A unique dessert combining the sweetness of pears with the flavors of Jamaica, served as an Indian-inspired gaelette.

ingredients.name: Pears
ingredients.notes: any variety, but firmer pears work best

ingredients.name: Jamaican Spice Mix
ingredients.notes: or a combination of cinnamon, nutmeg, and allspice

instructions: Peel, core, and slice the pears.
Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Arrange the sliced pears on one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Mix the Jamaican spice mix with a little honey (if using) and sprinkle over the pears.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the pears to form a triangle.
Brush the edges of the pastry with a little water and press to seal.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Serve warm, topped with coconut cream (if desired).
